notes: glm-4.6v-flash-9b is the clear winner - the only model that reads 大新銀行 cleanly without inventing a different bank brand. Most Qwen3.x variants correctly OCR the Chinese characters but then hallucinate an English bank brand (HSBC, DBS, CITIC, Bank of East Asia, D&S, Tung Kee, Tai Hing, DSB) - a consistent failure pattern. DVFX is consistently misread across all models (DWP, DWPX, DVPK, DMPK, DWF, DMFX, DWFX). The Gemma models struggled most, with gemma4-26b-a4b producing empty output and gemma4-12b hallucinating MTR/EXIT. Notably, NO model captured that Dah Sing Bank appears on BOTH sides of the street.
